title: Argentinian Tripe Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Argentina, made with tender tripe, tangy ingredients, and a rich broth.

ingredients.name: Tripe
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: Red wine
ingredients.notes: red wine vinegar or beef broth can be used as substitute

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Sear tripe until browned, about 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to medium and cook onion until softened.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add red wine, tomato paste, and tripe.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 2 hours.
Add tangy peppers and season with salt and pepper.
Continue to simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
